/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O2 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/macman.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macman.dir/src/cli/argument_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macman.dir/src/core/package.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macman.dir/src/core/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macman.dir/src/core/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macman.dir/src/core/transaction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macman.dir/src/net/http_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macman.dir/src/net/downloader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macman.dir/src/backend/homebrew_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macman.dir/src/backend/aur_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macman.dir/src/ui/progress_bar.cpp.o -o macman  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd -framework Security -framework SystemConfiguration
